title: penstemon speciosus var. pilifer
intro: Penstemon speciosus var. pilifer, also known as the showy beardtongue, is a perennial plant native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
